name: @xorcloud/stack-ai-chat-sdk
description: Floating chat widget SDK for React apps — powered by Stack AI

scripts.release:patch: npm version patch --no-git-tag-version && npm run build && npm publish --access public && git add package.json package-lock.json && git commit -m "chore: release $(node -p "require('./package.json').version")" && git tag v$(node -p "require('./package.json').version") && git push --follow-tags
scripts.release:minor: npm version minor --no-git-tag-version && npm run build && npm publish --access public && git add package.json package-lock.json && git commit -m "chore: release $(node -p "require('./package.json').version")" && git tag v$(node -p "require('./package.json').version") && git push --follow-tags
scripts.release:major: npm version major --no-git-tag-version && npm run build && npm publish --access public && git add package.json package-lock.json && git commit -m "chore: release $(node -p "require('./package.json').version")" && git tag v$(node -p "require('./package.json').version") && git push --follow-tags
